shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot holding a phone displaying a dollar-sign username, representing the Cashtag mechanic.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot holding a phone displaying a dollar-sign username, representing the Cashtag mechanic.
assets.prompt: Cash App's Cashtag | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) holding an oversized phone displaying a Cashtag-style username ($hatch) on a cream background. The username is displayed prominently in green text on the phone screen. Hatch's expression is cheerful and curious. No speech bubble, no copy. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
